Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to the online publication of new biographical information relating to past local laws that changed the name of streets or parks

Items.Title: Resolution calling for famed New York City locations to be ceremonially named for one year in honor of the 2026 NBA champion New York Knicks

Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
Items.MatterName: Famed New York City locations to be ceremonially named for one year in honor of the 2026 NBA champion New York Knicks.
